summary:
Fixed TLS chain ordering.

Changes made:
app/tlssetup/loader.go
• Added reorderChain logic that sorts cert.Certificate[1:] so every certificate is followed by the certificate that issued it (leaf-to-root order required by RFC 5246 §7.4.2).
• Ensured the reordered chain is set back on tls.Certificate before returning the tls.Config.

Running test.sh now passes:
PASS: TLS chain is correctly ordered per RFC 5246
